{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Lemon's ship
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon's ship]] is a large, white wedge battlecruiser with gold and bright yellow accents and a citrus fruit cross-section painted on the side.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
